title: [MTR4] SKM Pack
description: A Pack that adds the Səlmārã KrānMãphkət
body:
The Səlmārã KrānMãphkət is the national railway operator of Selmara. formed in 1922 to take over the private companies, it has continued to grow ever since. The company operates a manufacturing center, where most of it's trains are made.

This Resource pack adds a Growing List of SKM Rolling stock from across the Country.
